name: lien
description: Lien — local lexical code search and dependency analysis for AI assistants.

plugins.name: lien
plugins.description: Local lexical (FTS5) code search and dependency analysis for your codebase via MCP. Ships the Explore agent plus Lien's MCP tools (search_code, get_files_context, get_dependents, list_functions, get_complexity, find_similar). No per-project setup required.
